message:
feat(daemon): store VM CID and VsockPath after VM creation

Store vsock connection details (CID and VsockPath) in the task database
after VM creation and restart. For CreateTask, store them directly in
the initial task record. For RestartTask, update them after the VM
starts since VMs may get new CIDs on restart.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
